subject: [PATCH v2 09/14] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-05-12.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) in the Linux kernel's userfaultfd feature. It introduces a new mode, UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP, which allows userspace to register RWP-protected pages and receive notifications when access attempts are made on these pages. The patch also updates various fault handling functions to deliver RWP-related messages through the userfaultfd interface. This enables userspace to implement read-write protection policies for specific memory regions. The changes work with anonymous, shared memory, and hugetlb memory types. The patch exposes a new UAPI (UFFD_FEATURE_RWP) that allows userspace to query whether RWP is supported on their system.
